hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const cwd=process.cwd();const hasRegistry=fs.existsSync(p.join(cwd,'.repo-orchestrator/registry.json'));if(hasRegistry)process.exit(0);const entries=fs.readdirSync(cwd,{withFileTypes:true});const hasSubRepo=entries.some(e=>e.isDirectory()&&fs.existsSync(p.join(cwd,e.name,'.git')));if(!hasSubRepo)process.exit(0);process.stdout.write('⚠️  repo-orchestrator: No registry found in this workspace.
   Run /repo-orch-setup for guided installation (checks prerequisites + bootstraps).
   Or run /repo-orch-init to skip the wizard and bootstrap directly.
');"
